creator: dteske@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Devin here. Founding co-author of the zfsboot module (allanjude@ being the other).

Looks like I'll have to dogfood 11.1 sooner rather than later. At $work we're using 11.0 in the exact manner you describe without problem. I wonder if something has changed.

Might be 1-2 weeks before results though -- lots of other FreeBSD goodness cooking at the moment.
